---
title: "drcTMB"
output: 
    github_document:
        html_preview: false
---

```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "README-"
)
```


# drcTMB


## Installation

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# You can install drcTMB from GitHub by
devtools::install_github("daniel-gerhard/drcTMB")
```
